testcase.name: test_remaining_final_turns_decrements_to_end_game

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected phase 'ended', got 'playing' assert 'playing' == 'ended'
- ended + playing

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cactus_features.py:161: in test_remaining_final_turns_decrements_to_end_game assert game_state["phase"] == "ended", \ E AssertionError: Expected phase 'ended', got 'playing' E assert 'playing' == 'ended' E E - ended E + playing

testcase.name: test_game_ended_has_round_scores

failure.message:
